title: Create Advanced Schedules
description: Create Advanced Schedules adds programmable branching and time‑based logic to Create train schedules on Forge.
body:
**_This mod is still in development; please back up your world before playing and expect bugs. Please report bugs and send suggestions._**
# Create Advanced Schedules
## What it does
Create Advanced Schedules adds programmable branching and time‑based logic to Create train schedules on Forge. It lets you build IF conditions, time windows, and section jumps so trains can follow different routes based on time of day, redstone state, cargo, weather, inventory level, or runtime.

## Why download
Use it if you want more control over Create trains and more automation options without leaving the in‑game scheduling UI.

Important before download

- Requires Minecraft 1.20.1
- Requires Forge 47.x
- Requires Create 6.0.8+ (dependency)

## Notes
This is a Forge mod and will not work without Create. **This mod is still in development; please back up your world before playing and expect bugs.**
